Container.Name: BookBuddy
Container.Overview: BookBuddy is a family book tracker designed for parents rating books with their kids. Scan or search for books, rate them per child (loved/liked/ok/disliked), add notes, set a date-read, and track wishlist books you want to read. Browse your library with filters by child, rating, reading level (picture book / early reader / chapter book / middle grade), and get AI-powered recommendations for what to read next. Includes a full PWA for iPhone home-screen install.

Config.Name: Host Port
Config.Description: Port the BookBuddy web UI is served on.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database. Maps to /data inside the container.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: SQLAlchemy database URL. Default stores the SQLite file in the mapped /data volume. Change only if you want an external database.

Config.Name: Google Books API Key
Config.Description: Optional Google Books API key. Without a key BookBuddy falls back to unauthenticated requests (lower rate limit). Get one at https://console.cloud.google.com/

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Required for AI-powered book recommendations and cover scanning via Claude Vision.

Config.Name: Hardcover API Key
Config.Description: Optional. Enables Hardcover as a metadata source for books not found on Google Books or Open Library. Get a key at hardcover.app.
